title: User feature has no behavioral tests
reasoning: The Users app implements authentication, registration, session-expiry selection, and automatic creation of default finance categories, but its test file is empty. These are user-facing flows with security and data-initialization behavior, so regressions could ship without any local test failure.
recommendation: Add focused Django tests for successful and failed login, remember-me session expiry, registration validation, redirect behavior for authenticated users, logout semantics, and default category creation after user creation.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: The only included test file contains just the generated TestCase import and placeholder comment.
suggestedRegressionTest: Create tests in Users/tests.py that exercise AuthView.post for login/register paths and assert a newly created user receives the expected default categories.
minimumFixScope: Populate Users/tests.py with coverage for the auth views and user-created signal behavior.
